backlog.title: Export to Word (.docx)
backlog.description: Export story or chapter to Microsoft Word format for editing and print preparation

backlog.title: Export to PDF
backlog.description: Generate PDF documents from stories for sharing and archival

backlog.title: Cloud backup integration
backlog.description: Automatic backup to cloud storage (S3, Google Drive, etc.) for disaster recovery

backlog.title: Split-pane editor
backlog.description: Side-by-side view of story content and feedback/metadata

backlog.title: Keyboard shortcuts
backlog.description: Common keyboard shortcuts for navigation and editing (Cmd+S save, Cmd+Z undo, etc.)

backlog.title: Version history / Timeline view
backlog.description: Track changes over time, view diff between versions, restore previous versions

backlog.title: Drag-drop story reordering
backlog.description: Reorganize story order within arcs by dragging in dashboard

backlog.title: Keyboard shortcut help modal
backlog.description: Show available keyboard shortcuts (Cmd+? or ? key)

backlog.title: Random story button
backlog.description: Quick button to jump to a random story for inspiration or review

backlog.title: Recent edits on dashboard
backlog.description: Show recently edited stories on the main dashboard

backlog.title: Reading time estimate
backlog.description: Display estimated reading time for each story

backlog.title: Medium integration
backlog.description: One-click publish directly to Medium from dashboard

backlog.title: AI-assisted editing
backlog.description: Use Claude API for tone suggestions, expansion recommendations, copy editing

backlog.title: Collaborative editing with real-time sync
backlog.description: Real-time updates when Carina makes changes (websocket-based)
